group.label: License
group.comment: A valid licence is always required to use the admin Option-Templates, Bulk-Price and Migration tools. Paste your key below and Save, or activate a plan from the License page (eTechFlow → Extra Options → License).

field.label: License Key
field.comment: Paste your eTechFlow SP-XXXX subscription key (generated automatically after checkout) OR a per-module / bundle HMAC key. Leave blank if using a Bundle License Key. Then Save Config and flush the cache to activate. Bound to your domain (www. normalised).

field.label: Enforce Licence on This Domain
field.comment: By default, development / staging domains (hosts starting with dev., staging., stage., qa., uat., test., preview., sandbox.) run fully unlocked with NO licence. Set to Yes to require a valid licence here too — use this to validate your production licence on a dev / staging URL before go-live.

field.label: Issued Key (auto)
field.comment: Set automatically on first successful validation. Used to restore the key after an IP-block event. Do not edit.

field.label: License Portal URL
field.comment: eTechFlow licensing portal endpoint. Leave blank to use the default (https://license-service.etechflow.com/license/validate). Update only if your portal URL changes.

field.label: Bundle License Key
field.comment: Shared key that activates every eTechFlow module on this host. Set EITHER this OR the per-module key above.

field.label: Enable Module
field.comment: Master switch for the entire module.

field.label: Soft-Required File Options
field.comment: When Yes, customers can add a product to cart even if a file-type custom option is empty. Fixes Magento's hard "required option(s) weren't entered" error for file uploads.

field.label: Log Relaxed File Validations
field.comment: Write a debug line to var/log/system.log every time a file requirement is relaxed.

group.label: Frontend Radio-Card
group.comment: Used when a product page has a primary radio/dropdown option with related code/image inputs (e.g. "Would you like us to cut this?"). The frontend groups these into a single radio card. Manage option SETS centrally via eTechFlow → Option Templates.

field.label: Default Selected Choice
field.comment: Which radio is preselected on PDP load. None = customer must actively pick.

group.label: Appearance
group.comment: Make the product-option UI blend into any active theme (Luma, Adobe Commerce, Hyvä, or custom). Colours are read live from the running theme — nothing is hard-coded.

field.label: Adopt Theme Colours
field.comment: When Yes, the extension auto-detects the active theme's accent, text and border colours at runtime and styles the options to match. Works on Luma, Adobe Commerce, Hyvä and custom themes.

field.label: Themed Option Cards
field.comment: Render each choice as a bordered card that highlights in the theme colour when selected. Set to No to keep your theme's native option layout and only adopt colours.

field.label: Accent Colour Override
field.comment: Optional. A hex colour like #1979c3 to force the accent. Leave blank to auto-use the colour detected from the live theme.
